determinant_checks.comment: Direct partisan predictor of carbon-tax acceptance; extracted as a control, but it functions as a substantive moderator.
Directly tested carbon-tax framing; evidence supports a partisan interaction on acceptance.

missing_tax_determinants.evidence_quote: the personal fairness framing manipulation did not significantly alter strong and moderate Democrats’ carbon tax acceptance, and it further reduced strong and moderate Republicans’ support
missing_tax_determinants.comment: Directly tested framing omitted from extraction; overall null, but Republicans reacted negatively.

final_recommendation_summary: Keep the paper. Main direct determinants are partisanship and distributional fairness framing. Add the personal-fairness framing if exhaustive coverage of directly tested carbon-tax determinants is desired.
